meaning: n.危地马拉(拉丁美洲),危地马拉人
examples: Guatemala is an outstandingly beautiful place to visit.
He travelled to an orphanage (孤儿院) in Guatemala in Central America.
I lost my family while in Guatemala.
Throughout Guatemala, the US government recommends travelling in groups and with reputable tour operators.
Yet, the US and the UK have not issued travel warnings for Honduras, El Salvador or Guatemala.
